Footer.slogan: Empowering every glow with technology, refracting every hope with a prism, creating every future with ideas.

Projects.title: Our Work
Projects.description: A selection of projects that showcase our passion for design and engineering.

alpha.title: APrism-Home
alpha.content: This is the official website of the AperturePrism team, showcasing our vision, team members, and core projects. Built with Next.js 15, it combines Tailwind CSS and Framer Motion to create a fluid visual experience.
alpha.technologies: Next.js, React, Tailwind CSS, Framer Motion, TypeScript

neon.title: Fur-Img-API
neon.description: Team Project: Random Image API Based on Node.js
neon.content: Fur-Img-API is a high-performance random image distribution service designed for community developers. It offers simple RESTful APIs with support for various categories and size filtering.

quantum.title: Quantum Flow(Simulated data)
quantum.description: Productivity application helping teams manage complex workflows effortlessly.
quantum.content: Quantum Flow redefines the project management experience on mobile. With intuitive gestures and intelligent automation, team collaboration becomes simpler than ever.

nai2openai.title: NovelAI to OpenAI Proxy
nai2openai.description: NovelAI Image Generation API to OpenAI Format Proxy Service
nai2openai.content: A high-performance, powerful middleware service that converts NovelAI's image generation API into standard OpenAI DALL-E 3 compatible format. Supports multi-tenant Key system, Web management panel, and automatic image archiving.

adminWebUI.title: Aprism FRP Admin
adminWebUI.description: Management and access platform for private intranet penetration
adminWebUI.content: AperturePrism is a management and access platform for private intranet penetration, providing a control plane (Node API + React Console), and plans to rewrite the data plane in Rust. It offers node/client/proxy management, full-link logging, and event archiving.

gmi.title: GMI Mental Illness Guide
gmi.description: Chinese mental health knowledge base based on MkDocs
gmi.content: GMI (Mental Illness Guide) is a Chinese mental health knowledge base built on MkDocs and mkdocs-material. The goal is to provide the public with systematic, reliable, and easy-to-understand information on mental illness and medical guidance, reducing stigma and promoting understanding and support.

Privacy.title: Privacy Policy
Privacy.intro: At AperturePrism, we value your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal information.

collection.title: Information We Collect
collection.content: We may collect personal information that you voluntarily provide when using our website or services, including but not limited to name, email address, and contact details.

usage.title: How We Use Your Information
usage.content: We use the collected information to provide and improve our services, respond to your inquiries, and send you relevant updates.

protection.title: Information Protection
protection.content: We implement reasonable security measures to protect your personal information from unauthorized access, disclosure, or misuse.

Terms.title: Terms of Service
Terms.intro: Welcome to AperturePrism. By using our website and services, you agree to comply with the following terms and conditions.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of Terms
acceptance.content: By accessing or using this website, you confirm that you have read, understood, and agreed to be bound by these terms.

usage.title: License to Use
usage.content: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to access and use this website for personal and non-commercial purposes only.

disclaimer.title: Disclaimer
disclaimer.content: This website and its content are provided 'as is' without any warranties of any kind, express or implied.
